headline: Blackstone Steps Deeper Into AI With Google TPUs Data Center Venture
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) is forming a new U.S.-based AI data center company with Google in a large joint venture. Blackstone is committing US$5b in equity, while Google is supplying hardware, software, and technical services. The new platform will offer Google Cloud TPUs as compute-as-a-service to address rising AI infrastructure demand. A senior Google executive will lead the venture, reflecting deep operational involvement from the technology partner. For you as an investor, this moves...
